personal.name: Sujat Khan
personal.title: Full-Stack Developer & Designer
personal.tagline: I build projects — some for clients, most just because. Creating more than I consume.
personal.bio: I'm a developer who builds projects — for clients, for fun, and for the challenge of it. I contribute to open source when something catches my eye, and I'm always learning — mostly by shipping things and figuring it out as I go.

projects.title: ArmorGuard
projects.description: Autonomous AI pentesting agent that probes web applications for security vulnerabilities and generates severity-scored forensic reports — governed in real time by the ArmorIQ SDK for intent drift detection.

projects.title: Shukla uPVCCraft
projects.description: High-performance web platform for a premium aluminium & uPVC solutions business — rich animations, category-filtered galleries, and direct WhatsApp enquiries.

projects.title: Thrift by Muskan
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce platform for a thrift store — product listings, cart, Razorpay payments, Cloudinary image management, and automated email notifications.

projects.title: Jarvis Agent
projects.description: An autonomous AI agent for Windows that automates complex tasks through natural language using voice interaction, multi-step reasoning, and an integrated HUD dashboard.

projects.title: Ex-Ray
projects.description: A tiny open-source tool that scans your Instagram DMs and roasts your chat game with brutal honesty.

projects.title: Womanly
projects.description: A modern e-commerce platform built with Next.js, featuring a sleek design and smooth animations to enhance user experience.
